tasks.subject: Task 1: Add validate_alternatives to request/opts models
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Declare validate_alternatives (default True) on DetectionRequest, BatchDetectionRequest, AsyncBatchSubmitRequest, BatchOpts — mirroring homepage_fallback.

**Files:** schemas.py (:45-48, :153-156, :274, :294); test_validate_alternatives.py (create).

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_validate_alternatives.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/models/schemas.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_validate_alternatives.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_validate_alternatives.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 models expose validate_alternatives default True", "each accepts explicit False", "no other field changed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Gate two browser paths in DomainFR + skip metric
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add validate_alternatives ctor field; gate _validate_alternative_urls call (else: unvalidated medium alts) + Case-6 browser loop; add VALIDATION_SKIPPED counter.

**Files:** metrics.py (after :62); domain_fr.py (imports; ctor :167-179; :884-886; :1195-1196); test_domain_fr.py (append TestValidateAlternativesGating).

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_domain_fr.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/metrics.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/domain_fr.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_domain_fr.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_domain_fr.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flag False skips _validate_alternative_urls; medium validated=False; hreflang validated=True", "flag False: Case 6 no fetch_html", "flag True validates (regression)", "VALIDATION_SKIPPED increments on skip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Thread flag through routes + async worker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pass validate_alternatives from /detect, _run_batch_core/_process_item_core, sync /detect-batch BatchOpts, async worker BatchOpts into both DomainFR constructions. /detect-debug keeps default.

**Files:** routes.py (:131-140, :258-263, :291-296, :339-348, :406-414, :652-658); async_jobs.py (:189-193); test_validate_alternatives.py (append).

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_validate_alternatives.py -v ; pytest tests/test_routes_invalid_page.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/async_jobs.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_validate_alternatives.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_validate_alternatives.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/detect flag false: alts present, no browser", "_run_batch_core threads flag", "async BatchOpts threads flag", "/detect-debug ignores flag"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Crawler sends validate_alternatives:false on homepage detect
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add validateAlternatives? to DetectOptions, forward as validate_alternatives in /detect body, set validateAlternatives:false on homepage detect (routes.ts:473).

**Files:** DetectionLangueClient.ts (:28-33, :102-109); routes.ts (:473-476); DetectionLangueClient.test.ts (create, co-located).

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && node --import tsx --test src/class/DetectionLangueClient.test.ts && npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/DetectionLangueClient.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/DetectionLangueClient.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && node --import tsx --test src/class/DetectionLangueClient.test.ts && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["body validate_alternatives:false when option false", "field absent when option omitted", "homepage call sends false", "tsc build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Document the flag in both CLAUDE.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document validate_alternatives in api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md (semantics, default true, skip-all, metric, debug ignores, Case-6 verdict change) and crawler-service/CLAUDE.md (homepage opt-out + why).

**Files:** apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md; apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md.

**Verify:** git diff --stat shows both files.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff --stat", "acceptanceCriteria": ["detection CLAUDE.md documents flag", "crawler CLAUDE.md documents opt-out"]}
```
